name: Valda
bio:
Shadow Assassin of the Demon Hunter Faction. Proficient in assassination skills, he takes it as his mission to hunt down and eliminate corrupted beings.

Role: Physical Debuff
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that deals Physical Damage to enemy backlines and reduces their Defense.

skillSlots.name: Throat-Sealing Dagger
skillSlots.description: Attacks frontline enemies for 136% P.DMG and reduces target's DEF by 10% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Assassin Creed
skillSlots.description: Increases ATK by 10% and HP by 5%.
